backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (design system, floating hearts, music toggle, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a reference summary for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining shadcn/ui OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'To My Beautiful Wife, Taibaa' that preloads Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Great Vibes, Dancing Script) and mounts the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all seven page sections with fixed FloatingHearts and MusicToggle overlays, plus a branded caffeine.ai footer.
frontend/src/components/ApologySection.t: Scroll-triggered apology section with a beige/blush gradient background, italic serif apology text, decorative heart watermark, and Intersection Observer fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/DinnerInvitation: Dinner invitation section with date/location details, a 'Yes' button that triggers a radial heart burst animation, and a forgiveness button that reveals an inline message.
frontend/src/components/FinalSection.tsx: Renders the closing section of the page with a pulsing background heart, glow rings, and a fade-in message declaring love for Taibaa, using IntersectionObserver to trigger the animation on scroll.
frontend/src/components/FloatingHearts.t: Renders 25 randomly positioned heart emoji particles fixed to the viewport that continuously float upward via a CSS animation, serving as a decorative background layer.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Displays the full-screen hero section with a candlelight background image, animated title and subtitle addressed to Taibaa, and a button that smooth-scrolls to the apology section.
frontend/src/components/LoveLetterSectio: Shows a styled love letter from Zeeshan to Taibaa over a blurred rose background, with a glassmorphism card containing italic poetic text, revealed via IntersectionObserver fade-in animation.
Renders a grid of 8 placeholder memory cards with hover effects that flip from a photo-upload prompt to a romantic caption overlay, intended for personal photos to be added later.
frontend/src/components/MusicToggle.tsx: Provides a fixed-position play/pause button that controls a looping ambient piano audio track from Bensound, with visual hover effects using Lucide icons.
frontend/src/components/ShayariSection.t: Displays four Urdu shayari (poetry) cards with staggered scroll-triggered fade-in animations, separated by decorative rose ornaments, using Great Vibes cursive font for the verse text.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) actors, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a romantic design system with custom CSS properties (maroon, blush, gold, beige palette), Tailwind base/utilities, Google Fonts imports, and keyframe animations for floating hearts and glowing effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with romantic color tokens (maroon, blush, gold, beige), custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Great Vibes, Dancing Script), glow box-shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a luxury romantic single-page website for a personal apology and dinner invitation, tracking implemented features, architectural notes, image requirements, and design specifications.
